Following some previous appearances, the entire library of Pixel 11 wallpapers have now made their way online, but they’re pretty subdued and, frankly, a little boring.

articles.author: Lewis Packwood
articles.title: "Nobody's making games for the retired people" – The growing yet underserved market for grey gamers - GamesIndustry.biz
articles.description: Games are overwhelmingly made by and marketed to younger generations, argue analysts, while the older demographic is being ignored
